description: Style NoteThe Spanish influences in the design details of this sandal is the reason for the Spanish name, senorita. Subtle pastel hues, super soft footbed styling and classic designs with a sophisticated polish, style this pair with kohl-rimmed eyes and an ethno-western ensemble!Product DescriptionBlack sandal with criss- cross forefoot and midfoot synthetic leather straps Smooth footbedTPU outsole with butterfly shaped grooves and a mini wedge heel Material and CareSyntheticWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
